summary: Schema-planning task tracker parallel to Process Tracking, with only a couple of early rows filled and the rest left as To Do placeholders.

summary: Inventory of REDB-side fields and tables that need mapping or validation, including occurrences, PK/null/type flags, map-needed status, and generator helper columns.

summary: Formula-driven helper tab for emitting SQL and XML snippets from mapping data. Contains broken references and copy/paste-oriented output columns.
